name: Standing Hip Flexor and Abdominal Stretch
shortDescription: A standing stretch focusing on opening the hips and lengthening the abdominal muscles by reaching overhead and leaning back.
instructions: Stand tall with feet shoulder-width apart. Raise both arms overhead and gently arch your back, lifting your chest and looking up at the ceiling. Engage your glutes and extend hips forward to feel a stretch through the front of your hips and abdomen.
steps: Stand upright with feet shoulder-width apart.
Lift arms overhead, palms facing forward.
Arch back gently, lifting chest and looking upward.
Shift hips forward slightly to increase hip flexor stretch.
Hold and breathe for desired duration.
breathing: Inhale before arching; exhale as you hold the stretch.
